title: Ipomoea longipedunculata
taxonomy: Ipomoea longipedunculata is a species of morning glory plant. The genus Ipomoea is classified within the family Convolvulaceae, which is a family of flowering plants in the order Solanales. The species Ipomoea longipedunculata is native to China and is also known as the long-peduncled morning glory. It is a climbing plant with heart-shaped leaves and trumpet-shaped flowers. Within the botanical classification, Ipomoea longipedunculata is a species of flowering plant in the kingdom Plantae.

The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, which may help to alleviate various health conditions such as fever, cough, and skin irritations.
